ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the exchange */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data collection */,
  "trading_schedule" TEXT /* Trading schedule of the exchange (e.g., 24/7, weekdays only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "cryptocurrency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "volume_currency" REAL /* Trading volume in the cryptocurrency's currency */,
  "weighted_price" REAL /* Weighted price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade was made */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., CNN, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, Bollinger Bands) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market trend (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange (if applicable) */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency (if applicable) */,
  "can_view_data" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view market data */,
  "can_trade" INTEGER /* Whether the user can trade on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_cryptocurrency_id FOREIGN KEY ("cryptocurrency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trading team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES trading_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
